content: Original order: manifest items array is accession order, never mutated for analytical reordering. User reorder creates Range with behavior:["sequence"]. See IIIF cookbook recipe 0027.

Annotations with motivation:linking and two targets encode entity-to-entity relationships. Board connections should use this same model. Relationship type carried in body TextualBody with vocabulary term.

Content State (IIIF) encodes only manifest+canvas+selectors for interop. Workspace State (IDB) encodes full view restoration (active view, filters, zoom, panel config, board layout). Never overload Content State with app-specific state.

Vocabulary model: three-layer progressive formalization. Free tags (auto-complete) → consolidated (merge/rename) → controlled mapping (SKOS match types). Tags stored as W3C annotations with motivation:tagging.

name: IIIF types location
description: All IIIF types at src/shared/types/index.ts. IIIFItem, IIIFCanvas, NavPlace (GeoJSON), ServiceDescriptor union, IIIFAnnotation, ValidatorIssue, InspectorIssue.

name: Board IIIF two-tier persistence
description: Tier 1 (IIIF portable): narrative paths → Range behavior:sequence, connections → Annotation motivation:linking with two targets, labels → TextualBody. Tier 2 (Workspace IDB): positions, connection geometry, link styles, viewport. iiif-bridge.ts (474 lines) has complete bidirectional mapping but vault persistence is a console.warn stub.

name: Range-based virtual reordering
description: Manifest items = accession order (never mutated for analytical reordering). User reorders create Range with behavior:sequence per IIIF cookbook recipe 0027. Multiple named orderings coexist. Explicit 'commit as canonical' for genuine corrections runs REORDER_CANVASES. Missing: CREATE_SEQUENCE_RANGE convenience action.

name: Vault operations location
description: Vault store: src/shared/stores/vault.svelte.ts. Vault ops (normalization, queries, updates, trash, movement): src/entities/manifest/model/vault/. Actions (39 types): src/entities/manifest/model/actions/.

content: All vault state changes go through vault.dispatch(action). Never mutate NormalizedState directly. 39 action types in src/entities/manifest/model/actions/types.ts. Patch-based undo/redo (ActionHistory) depends on this contract.
